entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for June – SAP CAP ❄️ 🏔️
entry.content:
Managed to Escape! 
Thanks @ajay_soreng  for the challenge!

entry.title: System cannot find source storage bin
entry.content:
Hi All,

While creating Transfer Order from TR, I am facing this problem:

System cannot find source storage bin.

I have checked in the below settings but  unable to trouble shot.

1) In Material Master at WM views

2) In IMG under WM>strategies to see where the strategy directs the system to look for the material.

3) IMG under Logistics Execution > Warehouse Management Strategies > Activate storage type search > Determine search sequence. Check here if the put away (E) is created to your warehouse number as well as having storage types assign to them.

4) Logistics Execution > Warehouse Management > Interfaces Inventory Management > Define movement type. Here you can check that the settings between the Inventory movement an the Warehouse movement are correct in the 1st option Assign. next option LE-WM interfaces is where you check if the setting are defined for your warehouse number and movement types.

5) Logistics Execution > Warehouse Management > Activities transfers > define movement types. here you can define you movement strategies such as auto TO creation storage types etc for your warehouse number and warehouse management movement type.

I am still facing the problem.

regards

Chandan

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC IFP Capital Expense Planning
entry.content: Hi @Susanne_Helbig, Thank you so much for providing the information. I truly appreciate your help in clearing things up. I was a bit confused because I noticed that the same values exist between asset acquisition and depreciation, which doesn't quite make sense to me. Based on the data, can we conclude that these values are indeed invalid and nonsensical? Once again, thank you for your assistance in this matter. Regards, Praveen

entry.title: Re: Error triggering an event from ECC to SAP Event Mesh
entry.content: i am facing the same issue now. I have already done the code page maintenance as well. Were you able to solve this issue and if yes, could you please elaborate how the issue was resolved.Thanks,

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Consume an OData API as Actions using a Destination
entry.content:
Dear karthik.thiru2,

In SAP Build, I couldn't select the odata API to connect to the database tables. How should I configure destination. We would be most grateful if you were willing to reply. Thank you.

entry.title: City for country Colombia is not replicated.
entry.content:
Has anyone also had the problem with the replication of the city in Colombia?

The mapping for the address replication is created. The City is also displayed in the interface, but does not moved to P0006-ORT01 in SAP ERP.

Thank you for your responce.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP + Fiori Elements + fiori-tools-servestatic
entry.content:
You can role back the ui5 CDs plugin to 0.12.1 or wait for the fix.

A fix is Currently already in development: https://github.com/ui5-community/ui5-ecosystem-showcase/pull/1224

entry.title: SAP Build Action: Error fetching BTP subaccount destinations for subscriber tenant context.
entry.content:
I'm trying to test an Action in SAP Build. However, when trying to select a Destination, I get the the following error:
 
Error fetching BTP subaccount destinations for subscriber tenant context.
This error could happen for the following reasons:
Correlation ID: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
 
This is happening for all Actions.

entry.title: Re: Docx pptx documents not getting loaded in mass gos upload
entry.content:
Hello,

We are also facing the same problem where in the invoice not able to open PPTX, DOCX, XLSX extension file format.

Can you please let us know what was the solution in detail which will be useful for us.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Enable Withholding Tax for Non-Localized Countries/Regions in SAP Cloud Applications Studio
entry.content:
Hello, fellow experts.

This is a basic question, but I would appreciate any advice.

I'm thinking of developing the withholding tax solution on this page in my own company environment.

However, on the BCC file settings screen, "Use SAP Business Configuration Object" is inactive, so I can't select it and proceed.

Because I can't select it, I can't go to "Business Configuration Object -> Name, select Tax Type from the list."

Is this because I selected "Customer-Specific" as the solution type when creating the solution?

I would like to know how to solve this problem.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP + Fiori Elements + fiori-tools-servestatic
entry.content: wow ... quick and helpful answer 😉

entry.title: Re: Is there any equivalent app to J3RKKRD / J3RKKRS on S...
entry.content:
Thanks for the clarification — I understand that the current offsetting account determination logic is applied at the time of posting.

However, in my case, I’ve recently updated the offsetting rule, which means the previous postings no longer align with the new logic. I’d like to know:

- Is there a way to re-trigger the offsetting logic for existing documents based on the updated rule?

- Alternatively, is there any option to manually adjust or split the offsetting accounts for posted items? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public, Inventory Valuation 4.5. Determine Lowest Value - Range of Coverage
entry.content: Hello, your question has been forwarded to the experts. We hope to provide an answer soon. Kind regards, Jessica

entry.title: Fiori App My Team Calendar (F1309B) metadata issue
entry.content:
Hello Expert, i'm facing an issue with le application F1309B (2023 FPS02 o,n premise).

After completing all the steps to add in the fiorilaunchpad ( SICF node activation), publish the OData V4 Service Group UI_HCMMYTEAMCALENDAR_V4, create the semantic object, the target mapping etc...), i'm facing these issue on the load of the application.

Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement - Error: Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement

Failed to get contexts for /sap/opu/odata4/sap/ui_hcmmyteamcalendar_v4/srvd/sap/ui_hcmmyteamcalendar/0001/TeamCalendarShareMode with start index 0 and length Infinity - Error: Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement

Could you help me in finding what i'm missing here?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: System cannot find source storage bin
entry.content: Is this KBA relevant: 2458893 - System could not determine source storage bin

entry.title: Re: Mission Integrate SAP Signavio Process Manager with S...
entry.content:
Hi Belen,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community!  I recommended that you create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password), as described in this video, to have an expert look into this specific issue and guide you. 

If you have additional questions in creating a support case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. 

Kind regards,
Shreenith

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Build: Highlights from SAP Sapphire 2025
entry.content:
As the SAP Sapphire 2025 global keynote outlined, this year's focus was clear: AI, applications, and data. SAP Build continues to evolve in alignment with these themes, helping organizations efficiently build, automate, and extend their business processes and applications.

Here's a roundup of Sapphire's key SAP Build announcements and innovations to watch this year.

Joule Studio: Intelligent AI Agents and Skills Builder

Joule Studio Capabilities

SAP unveiled Joule Studio, a new environment within SAP Build that helps you create, deploy, and manage AI agents and custom skills. With Joule Studio, teams can enrich Joule with company-specific skills and intelligent agents that work across SAP and third-party systems. Joule Studio brings two powerful capabilities:

  • Joule Skills: Design modular, reusable skills that can be invoked during conversations. These skills can trigger actions, pull data, and orchestrate SAP Build components like workflows, automations, or apps.
  • AI Agents: Go beyond skills by building full-fledged AI agents that dynamically execute business tasks using reasoning capabilities. These agents use business context, data from SAP systems, and large language models to adapt to user needs.

Joule Studio will be available by the end of Q2 2025, with Agent Builder capabilities expected in Q4 2025.

Early adopters like Sovanta, an SAP partner, already use Joule Studio to enhance customer service. Sovanta significantly streamlined support processes and accelerated ticket resolution by integrating conversational skills with SAP systems.

Another early adopter, Pricefx - a global leader in cloud-based pricing software - is using Joule Studio to bring AI-driven intelligence into their solution. By developing an Agentic AI copilot, they aim to deliver contextual, business-aware guidance that enhances pricing decisions for their customers.

Interested in learning more? Register for the webcast: Meet Joule Studio: Drive Innovation with AI Agents & Joule Skills.

New AI Capabilities for Business Users and Developers

  • SAP Build Work Zone + Joule: Employees can now use Joule to find relevant apps, tasks, and documents faster. It can summarize or generate content based on your business data, saving time and boosting productivity.

Joule in SAP Build Work Zone

  • AI-Enhanced ABAP Development: Developers migrating to SAP Cloud ERP can use AI to convert custom ECC code into ABAP Cloud standards. This feature simplifies modernization efforts while ensuring code quality and compliance.

These capabilities are expected in Q3 2025.

 Expanded SAP Build Capabilities

SAP Build continues to grow as a unified platform with:

  • Extensibility Wizard for SAP Business Suite: A guided wizard that helps you build side-by-side extensions with the proper context, faster. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP SuccessFactors support is planned for release in H2 of 2025.

Extensibility Wizard in SAP Business Suite

Watch Sapphire Customer Session: Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP Build at OGE: Open Grid Europe used SAP Build to extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud—boosting onboarding efficiency by 50% and reducing invoicing time by 20%.

Watch Sapphire Solution Demo: Extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud: SAP Build application development and automation. Discover how to rapidly personalize and extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud while maintaining a clean core.

  • SAP Business Data Cloud Integration: Planned for Q4 2025, SAP Build will offer deep integration with SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) via CAP. Developers can consume and expose data products using virtual tables in SAP HANA Cloud, accelerating the development of insight-rich apps while reducing manual integration work. This improves data consistency and supports scalable, compliant development.
  • Event-Driven Applications: SAP Build, in combination with SAP Integration Suite and CAP, will support event-based interactions across systems. General availability is expected in H2 2025.

Simplified Pricing and Packaging

  • SAP Build offers a unified pricing model that combines app development, automation, and workspaces under a single entitlement. This simplifies adoption, reduces licensing complexity, and allows teams to build and extend at their own pace. Learn more in this blog post.

Thanks for reading! Which SAP Build innovation are you most excited about? Let us know - and don't miss these key resources from SAP Sapphire 2025:

  • Watch Sapphire Global Keynote: Your Best. Made Real. No Matter What Lies Ahead
  • Read SAP Sapphire 2025 Innovation Guide
  • Visit the Session Catalog with On-Demand Sessions

entry.title: How to index variant attributes to find them from search
entry.content:
Hi,

I have this scenario:

  1. it's B2B project
  2. set of baseProducts and each of them is declined in a set of variants; a simple, common and typical situation.
  3. The variants name contains a code that identify the product (it's ISO code, so, most of customer want retrieve the product just searching this code into search)

The standards SAP Commerce/solr configuration index the products and not the variants, so it means that the search retrieve the products and not the variants

The client want retrieve the product by searching the name of variant (my client is open to different solution, them are open minded, so feel free to suggest) .

My idea is:

  1. add the name of variant at solr index (or a different attribute)
  2. modify what is needed for retrieve product by searching the name of variants
  3. no changes to PLP or PDP
  4. the customer is responsible of select the right variant form PDP 

so:

  1. the customer search 'ISO 12345' into search bar,
  2. he land on PLP that list the product that group the variant 'iso 12345' (and we will have only one product)
  3. the customer click on the product and land on PDP
  4. the customer select the correct variant (with name 'iso 12345') through the dropbox

now my question: how do this?

entry.title: Re: mass add BP role in existing BP
entry.content:
Hello,

I had a similar topic but with Client role instead of Vendor.

I used the MASS transaction,  on object BUS1006.

Select the table BUS_MASS_BUT100 and the Field "Partner Role".

Then you add the list of BP you want to update, apply restrictions if any, and make sure to add the field "Partner Role" if not visible in the list of field to update.

Then you add the value of the BP role (you can find it in the BUT100 table) and click on the button to apply the change.

Then you can save and the system will have recorded your modifications.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Setting the GeoMap information in a model
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I created a model (I use an import job with a query behind to push information in the model), where there are many dimensions but in two particular dimensions they  contain Latitudine and Longitude data, called GPSLat and GPSLong.

I'm new with GeoMap in the model, so I want to enrich a new dimension called DocNum with latitudine and longitude information. 

So, for this dimension DocNum, I have understood that I need to create two properties of type Latitudine and Longitude, I did it and I called them LatProp and LongProp

My question is: how can I link these two properties LatProp and LongProp with the model dimensions GPSLat and GPSLong ?

I cannot understand how is possible to do this association, otherwise how I can show the docnum in the map?

Thank you so much for your help

Adriano

entry.title: AIF Namespace /EDCII
entry.content:
Hi all,

after I*ve created an edoc when I mark the edoc in edoc_cockpit an try to display as XML I got this Error: UBL mapping information cannot be determined.
Diagnosis

The mapping for the Cross Industry Invoice (CII) is based on the UBL
mapping for PEPPOL. This UBL mapping could not be determined.

while Debugging I saw in structure EDOC_CII_MAPPING_SOURCE which I coming from using Tocde "/N/AIF/CUST then Namesapce /EDCII then from the SAP Data Structure Field that the UBL_REQ_TARGET_STRUCTRE_NAME and UBL_REQ_TARGET_FIELD_NAME are empty.

from where come the value of both Fields!

Any Idee what Structure I nee to add for Namesapce /EDCII or this should be allready filled out from Standard?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: System cannot find source storage bin
entry.content:
not sure i am unable to open that link


But before posting i checked same question was already posted on 2008 its a same issue

entry.title: Re: How to check change logs in table CDHDR and or Utilizing CDHDR and CDPOS SAP Tables for Change
entry.content:
Hi sir

is this really required? because of this DBTABLOG become huge size. SAP not recommending also for all standard tables as logs will be more written.  Does all customers enable this for CDPOS,KONP,CDHDR,BKPF etc? 600GB space occupied in database only for DBTABLOG table and in that above are very huge records.

entry.title: Re: Unable to edit ARIBA PR after PO creation.
entry.content: What will be the other way of fix the issue as standard SAP is expecting the PO to be deleted First and then only Service should be Change. But in case of Ariba PR Payload there is no deletion indicator we are sending for the PO and hence resulting into Error. Since customer has having multiple PR & PO creation scenario and not limited to Ariba changing the error message into warning is acceptable to customer

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for June – SAP CAP ❄️ 🏔️

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA 2023 SP02, Adobe Livecycle Designer for SAP:...
entry.content:
Hello,

This might be the intended behaviour of the mentioned Barcode object. If it doesn't meet your requirements, you may consider using a different one that better suits your desired output.

Please refer to the following SAP Note:
1827559 - Incorrect Scanned values from Code128SSCC barcode
https://me.sap.com/notes/1827559

Best regards,
Norbert
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - How to create an action for uploading files
entry.content: I can't upload the excel file it appear as input not something i can upload the file from any help ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Information Extraction (DOX) Service with camera
entry.content:
Thank you @mingkho for this great blog post and your help to finally get a working mobile application.

One hint for everyone who also struggles with the correct settings in the destination, which results in an error when testing the connection to destination in the App Builder. The URL you need to enter is given by the URL in the service key extended by the swagger. In my case it was: https://aiservices-trial[...].com/document-information-extraction/v1/

entry.title: Re: Using SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 KPI Tiles
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"Another new feature in BI 2025 is the ability to use a chart as a tooltip. Not only is this effective in a Web Intelligence document, but these can also be pinned to the BI Launch Pad. In my example, I've created a Column Chart showing sales revenue by US state. I used the new UI5 chart, but the tooltip feature works with classic charts, too. "

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: HTML Preview in SAP BAS Made Easy: A Beginner’s Walkthrough
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"BAS is optimized for SAP development (Fiori, UI5, CAP) and not focused on static site previews. Running a local server is a great way to simulate real-world behavior for your HTML, CSS, and JS."

 

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Building and Integrating Joule to a Sample Application
entry.content: hi @SrinivasaMural , how can we integrate joule with postman or any other technology like python to generate the Business objects of RAP?

entry.title: SAP Academic Community Conference Kazakhstan 2025
entry.content:
SAP Academic Community Conference Kazakhstan 2025
Date: June 5, 2025
Location: Kazakh-British Technical University (KBTU), Almaty
Language: On-site sessions in Russian; follow-up training in English

The SAP Academic Community Conference Kazakhstan 2025 brings together faculty members, academic leaders, and SAP ecosystem partners from across the country. Hosted by SAP University Alliances in collaboration with KBTU Almaty, the event focuses on the intersection of education, technology, and industry collaboration.

What to Expect

  • SAP Technology Deep Dives
    Learn about the latest developments in SAP solutions and enterprise technology.

  • Gamified Learning Experiences
    Explore innovative approaches to student engagement through simulation and game-based learning.

  • Educational Innovation
    Engage in discussions on digital transformation in academia and curriculum modernization.

  • Networking Opportunities
    Connect with peers from both academia and the SAP partner ecosystem.

  • Career Pathways & Certification Access
    Discover SAP career opportunities and gain access to free certification programs for students and educators.

Follow-Up Online Training

Date: June 20, 2025
Delivered by: SAP UCC Magdeburg
Format: Online, in English
Participants who complete both the in-person and online components will receive a Certificate of Advanced Training (20 academic hours).

Participation Details

  • Cost: Free of charge

  • Certificate: Available for those attending both sessions

  • Registration: Required to secure your spot
    Register here

entry.title: Re: MS SQL Version
entry.content:
Hi Ahmed,

Check this SAP portal link 

https://help.sap.com/doc/011000358700000032462013e/9.3/en-US/B1_Platform_Support_Matrix.pdf

Regards

SS

entry.title: Безкоштовні вебінари SAP - не пропустіть можливість навчатися та професійно зростати!
entry.content:
Привіт, Community😉

Запрошуємо вас на серію безкоштовних вебінарів від SAP, присвячених цифровій трансформації. Вас чекають практичні інсайти, сучасні підходи до побудови ІТ-архітектури, інновації у сфері штучного інтелекту — усе, що допоможе розвивати професійні навички.

 

🔥Сьогодні, 3 червня, 14:00-15:00 - не пропустіть!

"Realizing Clean Core using Cloud Extensibility"
 Стратегічний підхід до підтримки чистого ядра систем через хмарні розширення

📋Найближчі вебінари тижня:

4 червня | Управління екологічним впливом

"Managing Compliance and Reducing Environmental Impact with SAP EHS"
 ⏰ 16:00-17:00
Дізнайтеся, як SAP S/4HANA допомагає компаніям оцінювати та оптимізувати екологічний вплив

5 червня | ШІ у бізнесі (дві сесії)

"SAP Business AI's Role in Cloud ERP"
⏰08:00-08:45 або 14:00-14:45
Розкрийте потенціал штучного інтелекту в контексті хмарної ERP-стратегії

5 червня | Маркетингові інновації

"SAP Emarsys Q2 2025 Release Recap"
⏰16:00-17:00
Останні оновлення та інновації платформи SAP Emarsys

🗓️ Наступний тиждень (10-12 червня):

  • 10 червня 14.00-15.00: Розвінчування міфів про Clean Core та SAP S/4HANA
  • 10 червня 15.00-16.00: Оновлення SAP for Me Q2 2025
  • 11 червня 15.00-16.00: Як SAP використовує власний Business Data Cloud
  • 12 червня 14.00-14.45: Інсайти Cloud ERP Private Package (AM/PM сесії)
  • 12 червня 16.00-17.00: Високодоступність та відновлення SAP BTP

🎯17 червня | Стратегічна трансформація

"Enterprise Architecture for Innovation-platform Ecosystems"
Архітектурний фреймворк для трансформації продуктових платформ

📅Зверніть увагу, що час вказаний у форматі CEST

 

💡Чому варто долучитися:

Безкоштовно - усі вебінари повністю безоплатні
Експертні знання від провідних фахівців SAP
Практичні інсайти - реальні кейси та рішення
Гнучкий формат - частина сесій доступна у записі
Актуальний контент - найновіші тренди та технології

🔗Як приєднатися:

Кожен вебінар має індивідуальне посилання для реєстрації. Деякі сесії транслюються наживо з можливістю перегляду запису, інші - тільки в реальному часі.

Не відкладайте на завтра те, що може змінити ваш бізнес сьогодні!

Слідкуйте за оновленнями спільноти та не пропускайте нові можливості для професійного розвитку 🚀

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required – Agent-on-Fly Configuration for...
entry.content:
Hi Vera_Jiang,

I have followed the SAP Note 2724592 - SAP Host Agent Outside Discovery ComputerSystem configuration and now the inceccdbgrp1 was visible in the command result (screenshot).

But still getting the same error message as shown in the below screenshot, while applying the templates to logical hosts inceccdbgrp1 & inceccsapgrp1 

The Diagnostics Agent-on-fly is enabled for both virtual hosts inceccprdci1 (Agent-on-fly inceccsapgrp1 (logical host)) and inceccprddb1 (Agent-on-fly inceccdbgrp1 (logical host)), screenshot is attached.

 

But the agent assignment was not showing for the logical host inceccdbgrp1 at the Hosts tab in the Managed System configuration, as shown in screenshot.

in LMDB, Hostname inceccdbgrp1 shows with port no 1433, which is database listener port, as shown in the below screenshots.

Could you please guide me here for the missing configuration for below error message.

Thanks in Advance for the support.

Regards

Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: How to Add Custom Fields from Custom CDS View into OD...
entry.content:

Attaching the entire file for your reference.

Feel free to review it and provide feedbacks or ask queries.

entry.title: Re: Issue in Refurbishment Process with EWM while Goods I...
entry.content:
Hi @Sunil7479,

"

  • What is the correct way to issue damaged material from production to warehouse/store under the DAMAGED valuation type?" -> Could you help to answer.  What is your organization Structure ? Is Production Location and warehouse location have 2 different Storage locations with same plant or different plant  ? with same warehouse or different warehouse ? both storage locations are EWM managed ? 

  • damaged material - > Is damaged material batch managed ? do you know valuation act as batch if no batch management ? Info: - Please read details link https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sewm/4128493281.html?locale=en-US

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Tutorial: Save and display text field more than 255 characters from Table Maintenance (SM30)
entry.content:
Hi arnabdatta3 ,
Great blog – thanks for putting that together! I implemented the solution and it worked well with the initial dataset.

However, I noticed an issue when dealing with a larger set of data. Specifically, when I scroll down and click the action button ( Edit button), it sometimes shows the wrong line or message, not the one that corresponds to the row I actually clicked. Please let me know , if u have any idea/solution for this.

entry.title: Disable Standard Delete Button in VA02 for All Users – Custom Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi ,

I wanted to share a quick solution I implemented to disable the standard Delete button in VA02 for all users.

 Solution

Main Program: MV45AF0C

INCLUDE MV45AF0C_CUA_MODIFIZIEREN .

To handle this, I added a small enhancement in the program: MV45AF0C_CUA_MODIFIZIEREN.
Here’s how I disabled the delete (LOES) button using CUA_EXCLUDE:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ENHANCEMENT 1 ZZENH_MV45AF0C_CUA_MODIFIZER2. "active version
IF sy-uname NE '  '  AND us_status EQ 'U' AND syst-tcode EQ 'VA02'.
READ TABLE cua_exclude WITH KEY 'LOES' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
CHECK sy-subrc NE 0.
APPEND 'LOES' TO cua_exclude.
ENDIF.
ENDENHANCEMENT.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Feedback is always welcome!

Regards 

Gurcharan Singh

entry.title: Re: Enable Joule for on-prem ABAP Development
entry.content: Did you make progess with this? We are on 2023FPS1 and also implemented 3513374 and updated Eclipse and ADT and get the same message as you. What is the missing step?

entry.title: SAP NOW AI Tour Kazakhstan
entry.content:
Get ready for the SAP NOW AI Tour in Almaty — a dynamic event dedicated to exploring how artificial intelligence is reshaping the future of business. Join SAP experts, customers, and thought leaders for an inspiring day filled with innovation, insights, and interaction

Date: June 18, 2025
Location: Almaty
Theme: Unleashing the Future with Business AI

Why Attend?

  • Discover AI in Action
    See how SAP’s AI-powered solutions are transforming real-world businesses through live demos and customer success stories.

  • Engage with Experts
    Learn directly from SAP innovators and industry specialists how to scale, adapt, and drive growth with intelligent technologies.

  • Expand Your Network
    Connect with a vibrant community of business leaders, technology professionals, and SAP partners.

  • Get Inspired
    Special keynote by Oscar Konyukhov, legendary explorer and project leader. With over 25 years of experience in extreme expeditions — including hot air balloon journeys around the globe, and missions to the Arctic, Antarctic, and Mount Everest — Oscar will share powerful lessons in leadership, planning, and overcoming challenges.

Registration

Participation is free, but registration is required.
Secure your spot now

entry.title: SAP CIS: SAP BTP/Fiori login as other user (proxy)
entry.content:
Dear community,

customer had SAP SuccessFactors as an Identity Provider for SAP BTP with SAP Fiori apps.

There were able to login to SAP SF as admin, proxy to another user and then go to SAP Fiori as that proxied user.

After the transition to SAP CIS both SAP SF and SAP BTP / Fiori are applications in SAP CIS.

The proxy functionality as known before doesn't work - CIS is sending to SAP BTP, during login, admin account instead of user account.

1) Is proxy possible in that architecture?

2) Do You have any other ideas how to login to SAP BTP / Fiori as other user without knowing/changing it's password?

3) I've tried to change login name in SAP CIS from admin to user, but that also doesn't work properly - maybe because in BTP users are created as "shadow users"?

Thank You for all the help You can give me!

Best Regards,

Saturnin Swędrak

entry.title: SOA messages archiving
entry.content:
Hi,

SOA is a type of interface or messages similar to IDOC and table we are trying to archive is SRT_MMASTER. We are trying to archive these messages from the above table. Kindly help

Hello @gurcharn_singh 

Why have you modified SAP standard for such a tiny change? If you had used Transaction Variants, you would implement the requirement without touching SAP standard code:

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: FIN_AA_RECON-795 Line Items ANEP/ANEA differs from Totals ANLC
entry.content:
Dear All,

As part of the initial phase of our S/4HANA migration project, we executed Asset Accounting (AA) pre-check reports in the ECC system. Several reconciliation errors were identified, specifically:
FIN_AA_RECON-795: Line Items (ANEP/ANEA) differ from Totals (ANLC).

Key Details:

  • These discrepancies relate to closed fiscal years (historical data).

  • Research indicates that running RACORR110 and RACORR55 (standard SAP reconciliation tools) should resolve the mismatches.

  • However, these programs are not available in our current ECC system.

Request:
Could you advise on how to proceed? Are there alternative solutions, or do we need to request access to these programs via SAP support?

Thank you for your guidance.
Best regards,
Alex

 

FIN Asset Accounting

entry.title: Re: Message mapping: How to handle empty parent node in s...
entry.content: While this fixed the issue, it still took some time for me to figure out what exactly your answer means. So whoever is as confused as i am: when mapping a value it requires for all the parent nodes in the given XML data to be available. If you are mapping down some children nodes but a node is missing, the mapping for your wanted node will simply be skipped. A method like splitByValue will be no help. What needs to be done is to select the source node, click the three dots and click on Contexts. Then you can define a new start for the Context, which ideally will be a parent node that 100% exists in your source data. Only then will the source field not be skipped.

entry.title: How to Trigger an Error Message Using the Condition Price as a Parameter
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I want to trigger an error message when the gross price per line item in the Purchase Order (PO) is greater than the gross price in the Purchase Requisition (PR).

However, in the current BADI implementation, we are only able to retrieve the net price from the PO, which is not suitable for this validation. This is because the net price already includes additional charges such as freight, which leads to inaccurate comparisons.

To ensure accurate validation, we need to use the gross price based on the condition pricing instead.

Any suggestions to make this error message?

entry.title: Re: Using OAuth 2.O to securely call SuccessFactors OData APIs from iRPA 2.0
entry.content:
Hi,

I was following your blog since I am setting up an SF API to login to Success Factors using a Technical User.

I am able to follow your guide up until "Read Json File". My question are as follows...

1.  For the "Get Access Token", I did not see an exact box from my SAP BPA Dev Platform. The closest I saw was "AccessTokenInput" which is a data type, is this the one? Also, from your Blog, there was a custom script for this, where should I do it? Because there's no field or button for the custom script.

2. For the "Create Post Call" command, I can't seem to find the exact box from the right pane - this one has a custom script box.

Thanks in advance!

eDB

entry.title: Re: Enable Joule for on-prem ABAP Development
entry.content: per SAP, "sorry for the late reply and the confusing messages. Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities are not release for S/4 HANA OP or Cloud private edition as of now. This product is only available for SAP BTP ABAP Environment (as of version 2502) and S/4 HANA Cloud public edition."

entry.title: EC Benefits upgrade process
entry.content:
Hi Team

We have EC core setup in Sales Demo instance, we would like to upgrade EC US Benefits. The prerequisites are upgrade for EC core setup, EC US localization.

We are not able to proceed as the upgrade button is disabled for EC US localization.

-----------------------

[Best Practices Configurations Employee Central Core (XX) Begins, The value of Picklist migration is true. Will continue the upgrade with MDF Picklists,  -------Preparing for Upgrade------ , Provisioning access granted to the user,  ------Performing Upgrade------- , 'Employee Central V2' is activated in Provisioning. Now the upgrade can continue,

BPMsg: There are existing foundation objects: EVENT_REASON. Upgrade cannot continue, Upgrade Failed; All changes will rollback.

-------------------------------------

entry.title: Re: Enable Joule for on-prem ABAP Development
entry.content: per SAP, sorry for the late reply and the confusing messages. Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities are not release for S/4 HANA OP or Cloud private edition as of now. This product is only available for SAP BTP ABAP Environment (as of version 2502) and S/4 HANA Cloud public edition." Please note: The meintioned note https://me.sap.com/notes/3513374 only refers to the ABAP AI SDK powered by ISLM. This does not include the Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities.

entry.title: Re: First Half 2025 Release: What is New for SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals?
entry.content:
Hi @RexRay 

Thank you so much for investing your time to test our latest performance experience and for sharing your valuable feedback. Your efforts genuinely contribute to improving our product, and we're grateful for your support.

I'm aware that you're currently facing issues with section comments not being saved, and I want to apologize for the inconvenience this has caused. Your smooth experience is our top priority, and we're committed to resolving this issue promptly.

Regarding the known issue mentioned in KBA 3596704, we have indeed implemented and patched a fix for it. However, based on your description, it appears that you might be encountering a different issue. To help us better understand and address the problem, I kindly request you to:

  1. Log a support ticket for the issue you're still experiencing. This will ensure that you receive timely updates and enable our support team to track and resolve the problem efficiently.
  2. If you have already created a support ticket, please share the ticket number with me. I will personally monitor the resolution status.

Concerning the RTE in admin use case, please note that our initial focus for this new performance form experience is primarily on enhancing the employee and manager experience. We are aware of the need to improve the admin experience as well, and we're exploring ways to overhaul and improve that for our customers. Stay tuned for updates, and thank you for your patience as we work through these improvements.

Once again, thank you for your understanding and feedback. We truly value your input and are dedicated to ensuring that our product meets your expectations.

Regards,
Luka

entry.title: SAP CAP mock REST service
entry.content:
I have a CAP application which communicates with an external API  (for user information).

I have written some simple test cases. All working fine. Now the more complex stuff should be tested and I need to mock my API.

As best with a static json response I can rely on.

So I tried to realize that but can't get a working solution.

Found something that looked promising... 

https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-service-integration-codejam/blob/main/exercises/06-mock-separate-process/README.md

But.. No luck with it.

entry.content: You are welcome, @LilingJia !

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Professional Services, Add profit to expenses in plan customer project
entry.content:
Hello Professional,

I am facing a problem with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Professional Services . If you know a solution, please let me know.

<Customer requirement>
My client wants to add profit to expenses and bill to customer.

Therefore,
In the app: Plan customer project - Work Package - Expense Type, register expenses (e.g. Accommodation Cost 100 USD, Revenue 150 USD, Billable). Also, set Contract Type as "Time and Expenses (P002)".

In this case, the Client Project Plan app displays the revenue plan correctly (Revenue Plan 150USD).
However, when checking in the app "P&L Plan/Actual (Report)", the column “plan amount” is 100USD registered as cost, not the planned revenue.
Also, when billing in the app "Project Billing Request", the billing amount is the registered cost amount, not the 150USD registered as planed revenue.

Similarly, the revenue recognition is calculated ignoring the 150USD.

Please let me know the solution for customer requirement.

Kind Regards,
Mamoru

entry.title: Can ‘Periodic Postings’ be disabled on Real Estate Contract?
entry.content:
Problem Statement - Would like to check if we can disable ‘Periodic Postings’ on Real Estate Contract.

Business Scenario - No invoicing from SAP CLM. No Accounting Entries should be generated from Real Estate Contract Periodic Postings. 

Expected Solution - Disable PERIODIC POSTINGS of contract from SAP CLM.

Please let us know if there is a way in SAP CLM Cloud version where we can disable Periodic Postings from Real Estate Contracts.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can ‘Periodic Postings’ be disabled on Real Estate Co...
entry.content:
Thank you for your question!

While implicitly disabling periodic posting for a specific contract is not possible, adjusting the conditions used in the contract can lead to this desired outcome.

Condition types with condition purposes 'Statistical' or 'Statistical, One-Time' can be utilized in this case, as Statistical conditions are not considered during periodic posting or in cash-flow.

entry.title: Maintain PIR APP- Sales Quantity
entry.content:
Hi All,

In the Fiori App of Maintain PIR, we have a field called Sales quantity. Does anyone know how does it got updated.

I create a sales order and also complete Billing still the value in this field in 0.

Withdrawal quantity was consumed from PIR during PGI but sales quantity did not get updated.

entry.title: Re: SAP LogServ integration with Microsoft Sentinel for SAP RISE customers is now GA.
entry.content:
Thanks @Hemanth_Kusampudi  

From the information provided in the blog post, it is mentioned that SAP LogServ will incorporate SAP Security Audit Log (AS ABAP). However, there is no clear indication regarding the coverage of other log types such as SM21 system logs, CDHDR, or CDPOS Change logs etc.

How will LogServ access SAP Security Audit Logs for the application layer, considering they are managed by the customer? Is any specific configuration required for this setup?

Does LogServ have the capability to perform log data correlation to eliminate noise and selectively ingest pertinent data into Sentinel for analysis and alert generation?

Eagerly awaiting your response on these queries for further clarification and information.

entry.title: Sales order availability check
entry.content:
We have a strange issue where sales order quantity is not getting confirmed for few sales order line items.

We have a delivery job setup which is causing partial deliveries created for few items as few line items are not confirmed automaically.

We want confirmed quantity to be detemined for all the line items at the same time so single delivery is created.

 

Even the Schedule line configuration(VOV5) does not have the availability check enabled, still we are facing this.

 

Also this is not happening for all the sales order, its random as pee our initial understanding.

any pointers will be really helpful.

 

We have enough stock and manual retrigger of availibility check in VA02 is solving the problem.

 

PS- Our system was recently upgraded to S4 2023 and seems we are facing it post the upgrade.

 

Regards

Akshay

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit App Step by Step
entry.content:
Hi, 

thank you very much for your guide -- it helped me a lot with my first touchingpoints with the Migration Cockpit. 

Do you have maybe an idea how to manage the sequence of multiple objects you want to migrate. 
As an example i tried to load Material BOM and Product Master Data by XML uplaod. 
Unfortunately if i select the Product and Material BOM Object and initiate the migration -- the cockpit is at first trying to load the BOM structure which runs on error as the related Product Master is not yet existing.  

I would have expected that SAP is managing the right order according to the predesessor objects -- which is not the case. 

If you have an Idea I would be thankful for an hint. ; )

Thanks in advance and have a nice day!

entry.title: Re: For valuation area 1000 is not exactly one logistic curtype defined.
entry.content: Any resolution ?

entry.title: A new way to respond to tariffs...
entry.content:
Tariffs can hit all kinds of Mill Products businesses, but exporting steel and aluminum to the US are probably the most prominent examples.

An interesting approach to coping better with tariffs was thought by Sujeet Acharya from SAP: Use SAP Supply and Demand Segmentation, which can hold attributes like country of destination (or origin) as values. The segmentation rules match the demand & supply, thus, ensuring compliance. SAP Supply and demand segmentation helps companies plan sourcing based on tariff exposure, prioritize procurement from low-risk regions, align manufacturing schedules with regional demand needs, and calculate costs based on country-of-origin inputs.

Obviously, this approach is somewhat limited to those who can run SAP IBP without the need for in-depth material-characteristic-based planning at this (rough) planning level. But I assume that many Mill Products business run their rough planning on materials or material groups, so this approach can be applied.

Read Sujeet's full blog here: https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blog-posts-by-sap/building-resilient-supply-chains-amid-tariff-pressure-with-sap-supply-and/ba-p/14106205

 

#IBP

entry.title: Re: Disable Standard Delete Button in VA02 for All Users...
entry.content: Thank you for your feedback. You're absolutely right that Transaction Variants can often address minor changes without modifying standard SAP code. In this case, we did explore that option initially. However, due to briefly explain the constraint — e.g., "technical limitations with the specific screen elements involved" or "the need to trigger backend logic not supported by Transaction Variants"], we found that a small enhancement to the standard was necessary to fully meet the business requirement. We kept the modification minimal, documented it thoroughly, and ensured it doesn't impact upgrade paths. That said, we appreciate the suggestion and will continue to prioritize non-invasive approaches like Transaction Variants wherever possible moving forward.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud - Flexible Workflow for Purchase Order Approval
entry.content: Mobile App for purchase Approval process?

entry.title: How to Streamline SAP Ariba Contract Workspaces with Bots Without Overloading Your System
entry.content:
A common challenge when using bots in SAP Ariba is ensuring that they are properly customised to prevent system performance issues. One scenario where this is especially important is when bots imitates human actions, ensuring consistency and efficiency responsible for updating mass contract workspaces, which can result in the creation of over 10,000 purchase requisitions (PRs). in such cases the bots must be carefully optimised to avoid overwhelming the system.

Here’s an example of the process when a bot updates a contract workspace and generates PRs:

  1. Navigating to the Contract Workspace

The bot begins by accessing the contract workspace and selecting the contract terms. This is similar to a manual process where a human would navigate through the interface. The bot then opens the contract terms and selects the appropriate realm, along with a few necessary details, ensuring the correct data is populated for further processing

       2. Creating Contract Terms

Next, the bot clicks the "Create" button to initiate the creation of the contract terms. During this step, it auto-populates the header information, such as the requester and requestor’s details (when creating auto-release PRs). Any required details are defined, including potential issues that might arise, such as missing or incorrect purchasing units or data selection, which have occasionally led to errors in past processes.

      3. Completing Contract Limits and Pricing Terms

The bot proceeds to the “Limits” tab and fills in any relevant limits that are required, though this step generally involves fewer entries. Once completed, it moves on to the line items, where the bot will input all the pricing terms. Unlike previous methods that may have relied on Excel files, the bot now completes this step by going line by line—filling in details such as descriptions, community codes, and material groups for each line item. Once this is done, it will save the information and return to the contract workspace.

       4. Attaching Files and Publishing the Contract

If required, the bot will attach any reference files associated with the contract. After completing all necessary updates and reviewing the terms, the bot publishes the contract workspace. This creates the contract term and prepares it for the final steps.

       5.Automating PR Creation

Once the contract terms and workspace are finalized, the bot auto-releases the requisitions (PRs). This automation eliminates the need for manual intervention, ensuring that PRs are created and released in accordance with the contract’s details.

       6. Contract Amendments and Updates

The process for contract amendments follows a similar structure, with the primary difference being that a contract workspace already exists. In this case, the bot updates the contract terms based on the provided information. These updates can include modifications to the header information, line items, or even the closure of the contract. Once the updates are completed, the bot saves and submits the changes, and then publishes the updated contract term, ensuring that PRs continue to be auto-released.

 

Example of the process

During the contract workspace creation or update process in SAP Ariba, there are eight distinct SourcingUpdateRequest messages that are exchanged between the Buyer application and the Sourcing application. These messages follow this sequence:

  1. Composing
  2. Submitted
  3. Sourced
  4. SourcingConfirming
  5. SourcingConfirming - Action - Approved
  6. SourcingCompleted
  7. Processing
  8. Processed

Each of these steps involves the system processing a message, and the system requires approximately 2 seconds to process each message. Therefore, for a single contract, it will take around 16 seconds (2 seconds × 8 messages) for the entire message exchange process to complete.

Managing Large-Scale Contract Workspace Updates

When dealing with large numbers of contract workspaces (e.g., updating or creating over 1,000 contract workspaces via bots), careful attention must be paid to system load and message queue management to avoid performance issues. To ensure smooth processing, the following guidelines are recommended:

  1. Batch Processing with Pauses:
    • It is advisable to process contracts in batches of 1,000 contracts at a time. After each batch, introduce a 30-minute pause before starting the next batch. This pause allows the message queue to be cleared and drained from the previous batch of contracts, ensuring that new messages don’t overload the system and cause delays.
  2. Pause Between Contract Request Creation and Publish:
    • To further optimize the process, it is recommended to introduce a 15-second pause between contract request creation and publishing. This is especially important when multiple bots are being used. For example, if 15 bots are running in parallel, each bot sends its own "Composing" message into the queue. By introducing the 15-second pause, the system ensures that these parallel messages have time to propagate, and the "Publish" button becomes visible for the next steps in the process.

Also additionaly to reduce the load to the system there is a parameter and feature toggle that can to Optimize sending sourcing update messages to SAP Ariba Contracts

Compliance Contracts with SAP Ariba Contracts

Restrain sending sourcing update messages

However, it is important to note,  if your business is already using or planning to implement bots within SAP Ariba, it is essential to follow SAP’s guidelines to ensure compliance and system stability. According to SAP Knowledge Base Article KB0405392, customers are contractually prohibited from using non-human users (bots) in SAP Ariba systems without proper registration. Although SAP Ariba does not officially support or certify bots, it does allow their use—provided they are registered through the SAP Ariba Developer Portal. Registration helps SAP recognise bot usage, ensures contractual compliance, and promotes responsible and secure implementation.

For further details and specific restrictions, refer to:

OPEC-6466: Support of RPA Bots on the Developer Portal

KB0405179: How to register iRPA Bots in SAP Ariba Developer Portal

By following these best practices, businesses can ensure that the bots function efficiently while maintaining optimal system performance, even when processing large volumes of contract workspaces.

entry.title: Discover the Learning Pages for Utilities and Oil, Gas & Energy Industries
entry.content:
Are you looking to enhance your knowledge and skills in the Utilities or Oil, Gas & Energy industries? Look no further! Our dedicated learning pages on the SAP Learning Portal offer a wealth of resources tailored to meet the needs of professionals in these dynamic sectors. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced professional, you'll find valuable content to help you stay ahead of the curve.
 
The Utilities and Oil, Gas & Energy industries are undergoing significant transformations, driven by digital innovation and the shift towards sustainable energy solutions. Our learning pages provide comprehensive overviews of these industries, covering key topics such as power generation, transmission, distribution, customer engagement, and the full lifecycle of energy production.
 
Free Assets:
  • Interactive Courses: Access free self-paced courses that cover the essentials of both the Utilities and Oil, Gas & Energy industries, including the latest trends and challenges. For example:
    • Introducing the Utilities Industry
    • Transitioning to SAP S/4HANA for Utilities
    • Executing Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Utilities
    • SAP Commodity Management Solution for Oil & Gas and Metals & Mining
    • Utilities
    • Oil, Gas & Energy
  • Quizzes: Test your knowledge and track your progress with quizzes designed to reinforce learning and ensure comprehension.
  • Record of Achievements: Earn records of achievements to validate your skills and enhance your career prospects.
  • Community: Connect with other learners and industry experts through forums and discussion boards.
Subscriber-Only Assets:
  • Live Sessions: Participate in expert-led live sessions that dive deep into specific topics, offering the opportunity to ask questions and interact with industry leaders.
  • Hands-On Practice: Gain practical experience with SAP systems through interactive simulations and real-world scenarios.
Get Started Today!
Visit the Utilities and Oil, Gas & Energy learning pages on the SAP Learning Portal and start your journey towards mastering these industries. With a wealth of resources at your fingertips, you'll be well-equipped to navigate the challenges and opportunities that lie ahead.
Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: Key-user extensibility and updating fields
entry.content: why you have that conclusion? what you tried?

entry.title: Re: Which tables does exit in S/4HANA for release strateg...
entry.content:
On what kind of system did you search (sandbox, dev, qual or prod system, cloud or on-premise, S/4HANA....)

Customizing should be in tables such as 

  • T16FG 'Release Groups'
  • T16FC 'Release Codes'
  • T16FB 'Release Indicator: Purchasing Document'
  • T16FS 'Release Strategy'
  • T16FW 'Assignment of Role to Release Code'

Did you

  • Check within Customizing (SPRO) 
  • Look for relevant blogs

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Professional Services,...
entry.content:
Hello @Mamo_533 

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Professional Services, planned revenue entered in the Plan Customer Project app is for planning purposes only and does not control billing or revenue recognition. By default, for contract type Time & Expenses (P002), billing and revenue recognition are based on actual posted costs, not planned revenue.

To fulfil the requirement of billing expenses plus profit (markup):

Recommended Solution:

  • Enable markup logic via the Pricing Procedure:
    • Use condition types (e.g., PSP1) to apply a markup percentage or fixed amount to expenses.
    • Maintain this in the SSCUI configuration for sales pricing.
  • Assign appropriate billing method in Assign Billing Method to Work Package (e.g., "As Incurred").
  • The billing document and revenue recognition will then correctly reflect the full billable value (e.g., 150 USD vs. 100 USD cost).
  • Revenue will be recognized via Event-Based Revenue Recognition (Scope Item 3EJ) using the calculated billable amount from pricing logic.

This approach is fully supported in S/4HANA Public Cloud and requires no custom development—only proper use of pricing configuration and billing method assignment

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Access Control in SAP: Why It’s Foundational for Your Application Security
entry.content:
As introduced in my previous post, one of the main pillars for securing an SAP system is Access Control. Even the most sophisticated authorization concept quickly becomes obsolete without strong, structured access control processes. Today, let’s explore what access control means in the context of SAP, why it’s crucial, and how you can assess and evolve your own landscape using SAP’s tools and services.

Looking at the Secure Operations Map (SOM), we are located within the domains of User & Identity Management, Roles & Authorizations as well as on the edge of Regulatory Process Compliance.

Access Control mapped on the SOM dimensions

 

 

What Is Access Control?

At its core, Access Control is about managing who gets access to what—and ensuring they don’t get more access than necessary. The goal is always a balanced approach:

  • Provide fast, seamless access to users so they can perform their tasks without friction or the temptation to bypass processes.
  • At the same time, minimize access risks by restricting access to only what's essential for a user’s role.

Getting this balance right is not only critical for operational efficiency but also fundamental to risk mitigation.

The Role of Identity Management in Access Control

Effective access control goes hand-in-hand with robust identity management. There are key lifecycle moments that must be tightly controlled to avoid unintended access risks:

  • Onboarding: Ensure new users receive only the access they need from day one.
  • Position Changes: Adjust access rights when roles or responsibilities shift.
  • Offboarding: Promptly remove access when users leave the organization.

At each of these stages, it’s vital to align provisioning activities with your access control policies. Failing to do so can introduce serious vulnerabilities into your SAP environment.

Main domains of access control

 

How to Assess Your Access Control Maturity

To understand where you stand—and where you need to go—a maturity assessment can provide structure:

  1. Initial: No formal process in place.
  2. Defined: Processes are documented and followed.
  3. Optimizing: Processes are automated, monitored, and continuously improved.

Once you know your maturity level, you can begin thinking about tooling and how best to support your access control processes.

Maturity Assessment of your Access Control processes

 

Tooling Options: SAP Access Control and SAP IAG

When it comes to tools for access control in your SAP landscape, we typically recommend:

  • SAP Access Control (AC) for on-premise or hybrid environments
  • SAP Identity Access Governance (IAG) for cloud-centric landscapes

Depending on your current setup and future roadmap, there are three main integration options, each with its own pros and cons.

Option 1: SAP IAG Standalone

Using SAP IAG independently for both cloud-native and on-premise systems.

Pros:

  • Functions as a central, leading system.
  • Direct integration with SAP Cloud applications.
  • SAP’s development efforts are focused on IAG.
  • No need to upgrade or migrate existing SAP Access Control.

Cons:

  • Only replicated data can be analyzed.
  • Not all SAP AC features are available in IAG.

SAP IAG Standalone

Option 2: SAP IAG and SAP AC in Parallel

Running both systems independently.

Pros:

  • Direct cloud integration through IAG.
  • Existing SAP AC functionalities remain untouched.
  • Fully standardized and supported SAP solution.

Cons:

  • Duplicate administration efforts
  • Duplicate storage of user data
  • No cross-system risk analysis capability

SAP IAG and SAP AC in Parallel

Option 3: IAG Bridge – Integrating SAP AC with SAP IAG

Connecting SAP AC to the cloud via the IAG bridge component.

Pros:

  • Full integration between SAP Access Control and cloud apps.
  • Standard, fully supported SAP solution.

Cons:

  • Limited to specific user data source systems (LDAP, AS ABAP, SAP HCM).
  • Requires an upgrade or migration of the existing SAP AC system.

IAG Bridge – Integrating SAP AC with SAP IAG

Need Help Navigating Your Options?

Choosing the right path for your landscape can feel overwhelming. Don’t worry—we can help you define a strategy that fits your specific needs and architecture.

Also, check out Elvira’s post on the IAG QuickStart Service for a guided approach to quickly enabling SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance.

In my next post, I’ll take a closer look at Identity and Access Management (IAM) and SAP Cloud Identity Services—guiding you through the architecture and processes needed to get your IAM foundation right.

Feel free to reach out if you have questions or need support in evaluating your access control maturity or SAP tooling options.

entry.title: Re: Adding New Font to SAP
entry.content: It Helped, Thanks.

entry.title: Re: OData V4 Easy way to update Model?
entry.content:
Hello Mathias_Uhlmann,

I try to update the non-primitive value like the array of object, and object i got the error so can you tell me a way to do that, i can't able to update the data directly through the property binding like we do for the string, number and boolean

let oModel = this.getView().getModel();
let sPath = "/ReportsExposed(" + this._oSelectedReportContext.getObject().ID + ")";
let oContextBinding = oModel.bindContext(sPath, null, {
              $$updateGroupId: "ReportsChanges",
});
await oContextBinding.requestObject().then((oData) => {
       oData.securityFilters = reportObject.securityFilters;
});

this is the method i used to update the value but the changes is not going in the $batch call 


Thanks in advance 
Yash

entry.title: Suppression d'un utilisateur et récupération de ses états
entry.content:
Bonjour.

Nous sommes en version BO 4.3 SP3. 

Nous avons supprimé par erreur un utilisateur. De ce fait tous ses états personnels ont disparu. Ses documents dans les dossiers publics sont devenus propriété de l'administrateur.

Nous cherchons à trouver un moyen pour récupérer les documents qu'il avait dans son dossier personnel. La corbeille administrateur ne les contient pas.

Nous avons tenté de mettre en place sur un serveur de recette le filestore sauvegardé la veille du problème ainsi que le référentiel associé mais sans succès.

Auriez vous une piste pour nous aider à retrouver des documents ?

Merci d'avance

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP BO SDK with RESTful Services to Retri...
entry.content:
Hello, Luis.

I assume you've already looked at the REST API docs for WebI - you can get some info on universes via the /universes endpoint, but it's only very basic info.  But that might be all that you need.

As to your questions:

  1. There is a way to integrate SDK functionality directly into SAP BO, for example by creating new internal RESTful APIs.
    No, not without getting very deep into the existing code (i.e., decompiling the jars and adding your new code).

  2. It’s possible to extend the existing functionality of the SAP BO RESTful Web Service application by adding new endpoints to cover backend features like retrieving the Data Foundation.
    Not easily.  There is a way to add custom jsp to BI launchpad; that would at least take care of the authentication.  I'm not aware of any way to add a custom endpoint to /biprws.

  3. Or alternatively, if it’s feasible to develop a new application within SAP BO that exposes custom RESTful services built on top of the SDK.
    This is your best bet.  You could definitely build out a new application that acts as a REST endpoint and uses the SDK to retrieve metadata on universes.  You could run it on the same Tomcat instance but as a separate web application.  Since the application would be outside of /biprws and /BOE, it would need to implement authentication, but that would not be difficult (unless you want to do SSO, which is a little more work, but possible).  You could even do a passthrough to /birpws for calls to the existing API, so you would have a single endpoint that supports both WebI and unx.

entry.title: Re: FIN_AA_RECON-795 Line Items ANEP/ANEA differs from To...
entry.content: Read KBA 3038014 - RC FDQ AA: Errors and possible solutions in Reconciliation Report for Asset Accounting which explains how to create an incident to get the correction tool when archiving and accepting the error are not possible.

entry.title: Re: Integration suite setup custom domain for integration endpoints in an extension landscape
entry.content:
Thanks for the wonderful post. I would need some help to understand more on custom domain for integration suite developer hub. We want developer hub "core-test-xxxxxxxx.apibhubenterprise.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com" available at https://developer.xxxxxx.cloud. I am using custom domain service UI on an independent subaccount and my integration suite runs on another but in the same global account and region. 

It is not clear what to select when it comes to Landscape as one there is a mix of with extension. There are two options while creating custom domain i.e. subaccount's CF organization and SaaS subscription. Which to select for developer hub? My cloud foundry is on cf-eu10-004, integration suite is on cf-eu10-002 and developer hub is on eu10.
Appreciate your guidance on this.
Thank you.
Regards,
Vdev

entry.title: Re: Can OpenSSL in Crystal Reports 2025 be an install opt...
entry.content:
Hi Gerald,

R&D confirmed CR does have extended support, they can see this as follows:

I have to remove the names of SAP Developer but here their response:

"Yes we have extended support for 1.0.2.x version of OpenSSL. But related about the proof I am not sure can we provide the details.

Only thing I can say that in the latest 4.3 Stream we are using openssl-1.0.2zd version which will not be able available in the OpenSSL site."

And to show them see this:

Thanks! I think the openssl-1.0.2zd version itself is also a good proof.

Hi Don,

Please let us know if below information help customer remove their concern.

FYI, I find 1.0.2zd version was already shipped in BI 4.3 SP04 (and CR2020 SP04).

So as you can see SAP Team has taken care of this for you already....

Please pass the info on and let us know if this passes their security tests?

Have a great day

Don

entry.title: Re: Sales order availability check
entry.content:
Have you executed ATP_VBBE_CONSISTENCY after upgrade? 

Also read - SAP Note 2651341 - FAQ: report ATP_VBBE_CONSISTENCY.

entry.title: Re: Availability check in Sales order
entry.content: Checking Availability in SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: How to send parameter values to SAC Data Action throu...
entry.content:
Hi @William_Yu

Thanks for your reply.

I have updated below code and getting error while passing the variable value filter_C to setparameterValue function. If I use double or single quotes, the variable is not recognizing. If I remove quotes, its giving below error.

Application.showBusyIndicator(" DA Executing...");

var filter_CC= Application.getFileDataSource("xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx").getDimensionFilters("CompCode")[0];
switch (filter_CC.type){
case FilterValueType.Single:
var filter_C = cast(Type.SingleFilterValue, filter_CC);
console.log(filter_C.value);
break;}

DataAction_1.setParameterValue("FYMonth_Input",'[Date].[FYP].&[202501]');
//DataAction_1.setParameterValue("CCODE_Input","100");
DataAction_1.setParameterValue("CCODE_Input",filter_C);
DataAction_1.setParameterValue("SalesGroup","SG1");
DataAction_1.execute();

Application.refreshData();
Application.hideBusyIndicator();

Mamo_533

entry.title: Re: Sales order availability check
entry.content:
ATP is a big topic with the details you shared, it will be difficult to assist you.  Couple of questions to understand the issue

  • How the sale orders are created?  via Background job or manually ?
  • If manually, when again manual availability check carried out ?
  • Is it for one material all the time or many?
  • while creating sale order, did you check the unrestricted stock in co09?

Better go through SAP note 835219 to understand more on ATP functionality

entry.title: Re: Splitting a XSTRING into a Table
entry.content: SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY is the one.

entry.title: BADI ? to add Pricing Condition records in a PO
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are on S4 Public Cloud and have a business scenario where PO get automatically created upon SalesOrder(SO) creation . In the SO, we manually add custon pricing condition types and are hoping to have these condition types automatically flow into associated PO's. We understand from SAP that custom condition types will NOT flow automatically from SO to PO using config in CBC.

So we are looking at options around how to acheive it using KeyUser/Developer Extensibility but so far I have not come across a BADI in MM area which allows "Addition" of new condition type records. Essentially any Pricing BADI which has conditionType field and its related attributes in Change mode would likely help.

Has anyone come across a similar scenario or aware of a BADI that allows "addition" of new condition type records to a PO.

Appreciate any help.

 

Thanks

RK

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
Hi, thanks for the update! What about the picture sizes of posts? I have the feeling the larger my picture is the smaller it becomes when posting it... 

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Is Data extraction from SAP SF-ICM to SAP datasphere...
entry.content: We have replicated few tables with import option. Enabled real time replication, which subsequently enabled delta.

entry.title: Re: Is Data extraction from SAP SF-ICM to SAP datasphere...

entry.title: Re: Sales order availability check
entry.content: Sales orders are created via Idoc
